title: WildGrowth
description: This backports and expands upon the nature part of the 1.21.5 spring to life drop...
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f0fe5672d0ddebf7198bdd4d34e4545517c6fea.png) please do not upload this to any other site without Addie's permission ------------- [](https://modrinth.com/project/wildgrowth) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/amblekit) [](https://fabricmc.net/) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png) -------------

Small Q&A!

### What does this add / do? - This backports and expands upon the nature part of the 1.21.5 spring to life drop... ### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge? - Nope. I just don't have the time to maintain multiple mod versions. You can look at the `DEV TALK` page [here](https://addi3.github.io/) for a detailed answer. ### How do i get access to betas? - You can access betas via my [Ko-fi page](https://ko-fi.com/addi3dabaddie)! ### Can you add... / How do you use...? - You can suggest stuff on the github issues page or on the my official [discord server](https://discord.gg/5JDKuzarcS)! I will also answer any questions on either site! ### Want more Q&A? See [HERE](https://addi3.github.io/wildgrowth_wiki) ------------- -------------

Required Mods!

- AmbleKit (latest 1.20.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/amblekit/versions) - Lithostitched (latest fabric 1.20.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched/versions?g=1.20.1&l=fabric)

Recommended Mods!

- Continuity (latest fabric 1.20.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/versions?g=1.20.1&l=fabric) ------------- -------------

Credits

### Developers: - [Addi3_Astarr](https://addi3.github.io/) (Lead Developer) ------------- -------------
